artifacts.summary: Official-domain discovery found a central TU Dresden page on text-generating AI systems with privacy, examination-law, Chat AI, and good-scientific-practice guidance. A Schreibzentrum page provides teaching-facing resources for scientific writing with AI tools. A pilot AI/LLM service page was login-protected, and faculty/event sources were rejected for limited scope or low policy specificity.

stopConditions: Stop after public TU Dresden sources support central or explicitly teaching-scoped claim candidates.
Do not infer university-wide policy from faculty-only PDFs or event listings.
Do not bypass the login-protected pilot-service page.

artifacts.claimText: TU Dresden's public AI-use guidance says the GWDG Chat AI service is available to German universities and that TU Dresden users access it with ZIH login via Academic Cloud.

artifacts.claimText: TU Dresden's public AI-use guidance says teachers and examiners can decide whether and to what extent AI-supported text-generation tools such as ChatGPT are used, including as permitted aids in examinations.

artifacts.claimText: TU Dresden's public AI-use guidance says unlabeled or unauthorized use of aids, including answers or results generated with AI-supported text-generation tools such as ChatGPT, constitutes deception under examination law.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Die Nutzung von textgenerierenden KI-Systemen wie ChatGPT an der TU Dresden
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Die Gesellschaft fuer wissenschaftliche Datenverarbeitung mbH Goettingen (GWDG) stellt kostenfrei den Large-Language-Model-Dienst (LLM) Chat AI fuer Hochschulen in Deutschland zur Verfuegung. Der Zugang zur Nutzung erfolgt per ZIH-Login ueber die Academic Cloud.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: GWDG provides Chat AI for German universities; TU Dresden users access it with ZIH login via Academic Cloud.

artifacts.title: Technische Universitaet Dresden AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: TU Dresden has a central public page for using text-generating AI systems such as ChatGPT. Staged claims cover Chat AI access through Academic Cloud, examination-law treatment of permitted and unauthorized AI use, privacy guidance for external AI systems, and a teaching-scoped Schreibzentrum resource page. The pilot AI/LLM service page was login-protected and was not used for claims.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The pilot AI/LLM service page returned login-protected content and was recorded as inaccessible rather than used as evidence.
Faculty-specific and event-only sources were rejected for broad tracker claims.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
